zh.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Clement Drew Sr於1694年3月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福時，他的父親Thomas Drew29歲，母親Mary Bunker-15歲。他於1718年5月20日與Mary Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1724年登記服兵役。他去世於1763年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德馬德波利享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Clement Drew Sr于1694年3月21日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福时，他的父亲Thomas Drew29岁，母亲Mary Bunker-15岁。他于1718年5月20日与Mary Bunker在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1724年登记服兵役。他去世于1763年5月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德馬德波利享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from a Norman French personal name Dreus based on ancient Germanic Drogo, the name of one of the sons of Charlemagne (compare Gothic driugan ‘to serve as a soldier’). In Old French this name became Dreus, Drues (nominative) and Dru, Driu, Dreu (accusative) and was introduced to England by the Normans. For further information about this name, see also Montague .
English: from the personal name Drew, a pet form of Andrew which was confused with the same name of Old French origin (see 1 above).

Irish: when not an adoption of the English surname, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Druaidh or Ó Druaidh or Ó Draoi ‘son’ and ‘descendant of the druid’, from draoi ‘druid’, genitive druadh or draoi. All of these were often Anglicized as Drury .

variants.name: Drews
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Gerhard, Gunter, Hans, Heinz, Helmut, Otto, Reinhold, Bernd, Detlef, Egon, Erna.
English: variant of Drew with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is also found in Guernsey in the Channel Islands.
Americanized form of German, Danish, and Dutch   Drewes  .

variants.name: Drewer
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Droart, Drouart (which is probably from ancient Germanic Droghard, with the first element as in Drew + hard ‘brave, hardy’).

variants.name: Drewett
meanings: English (Wiltshire, Berkshire, and Surrey): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Druet, a diminutive of Drue, Dreu (from ancient Germanic Drogo); see Drew 1. Alternatively, the name may be from a diminutive of Old French dru ‘lover’; see Drew 4.

variants.name: Dronet
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcee, Desire, Olympe.

French (mainly Loire-Atlantique): from a diminutive of the personal name Dron, derived from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ).

variants.name: Droz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Aida, Cruz Maria, Diego, Jose, Miguel, Milagros, Nydia, Osvaldo, Rodriguez, Vidal.

French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). This surname is also found in Puerto Rico.

variants.name: Drea
meanings: Irish (Kilkenny): shortened Anglicized form of Ó Draoi (see Drew ).

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

variants.name: Drouin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Armand, Benoit, Jacques, Andre, Clermont, Emile, Gaston, Gilles, Ovide, Pierre, Serge.

French: from a pet form of the Old French personal name Droue, a variant of Dreue, which is from the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names based on the element drog, presumably meaning ‘battle’ (see also Drew ). Compare Derouen , Derouin , and Tron .

variants.name: Drury
meanings: English (Lincolnshire): variant of   Drury  .

variants.name: Drouhard
meanings: French:
from the ancient Germanic personal name Droghard, composed of the elements drog (presumably meaning ‘battle’; see also Drew ) and hard ‘hard, strong’.
alternatively, a derivative of the ancient Germanic name Drogo, a short form of compound names like Droghard (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Clement
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Late Latin name Clemens (genitive Clementis) meaning ‘merciful’. This was borne by several early saints, notably the fourth pope and the early Christian theologian Clement of Alexandria (Titus Flavius Clemens, ad ?150–?215 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Clement Drew Sr was born on 21 March 1694, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Drew, was 29 and his mother, Mary Bunker, was -15. He married Mary Bunker on 20 May 1718, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1724. He died in May 1763, in Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Clement Drew Sr est né le 21 mars 1694, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Drew, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Bunker, avait -15 ans. Il a épousé Mary Bunker le 20 mai 1718, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1724. Il est décédé en mai 1763, à Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans.

Er hat am 20. Mai 1718 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Mary Bunker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1724 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. it.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Drew Sr è nato il il 21 marzo 1694 nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Thomas Drew, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mary Bunker, aveva -15 anni. Lui sposato Mary Bunker il 20 maggio 1718, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1724. ja.lifeSummary: Clement Drew Srが1694年3月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーで生まれた時，父Thomas Drewは29歳，母Mary Bunkerは-15歳であった。1718年5月20日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでMary Bunkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1724年に兵役登録をした。彼は1763年5月にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードマドブリーで69歳で死去した。

ko.Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, Briti: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 매드버이
ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.lifeSummary: Clement Drew Sr(이)가 1694년 3월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Drew(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Bunker(은)는 -15세였다. 그는 1718년 5월 20일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Mary Bunker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1724년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1763년 5월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 매드버이에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Clement Drew Sr nasceu em 21 de março de 1694, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Drew, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Bunker, tinha -15 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Bunker em 20 de maio de 1718, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1724. Ele faleceu em maio de 1763, em Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 69 anos.

ru.Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, Briti: мадбури, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Colonia: довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Clement Drew Sr родился 21 марта 1694 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Drew было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Bunker, -15. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Bunker 20 мая 1718 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. В 1724 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер май 1763 г. в местности мадбури, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Clement Drew Sr nació el 21 de marzo de 1694, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Drew, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Bunker, tenía -15 años. Se casó con Mary Bunker el 20 de mayo de 1718, en Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1724. Murió en mayo de 1763, en Madbury, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años.
